stories.headline: What we know about Israel killing Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil
stories.description: Khalil was killed and her colleague injured in what Lebanese officials are calling a ‘double-tap’ strike by Israel.

stories.headline: Lebanese journalist killed in targeted Israeli airstrikes, officials say
stories.description: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also s...

stories.headline: Who is John Phelan the US Navy Secretary fired by Pete Hegseth?
stories.description: Phelan’s firing reveals turbulence in US military leadership amid the ongoing US-Israeli war with Iran.

stories.headline: India to Iran: How two wars shaped the rise of Pakistan’s Asim Munir
stories.description: The war against India a year ago led to Munir’s elevation to the status of field marshal. Now he’s playing peacemaker.

stories.headline: Gaza’s second front: The battle against disease-carrying rats
stories.description: Palestinian families in Gaza endure daily terror from rats in unsanitary camps, but help is hard to come by.
